name: INTERNATIONAL LONGSHOREMEN'S ASSOCIATION, LOCAL 1416, AFL-CIO v. ARIADNE SHIPPING CO., LTD., et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in INTERNATIONAL LONGSHOREMEN'S ASSOCIATION, LOCAL 1416, AFL-CIO v. ARIADNE SHIPPING CO., LTD., et al. (397 U.S. 195, 1969 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
